name: Date Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups dates, cut into large pieces
2 cups Pillsbury's Best All Purpose Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Pour boiling water over dates and baking soda. Allow mixture to cool.
3. Sift together flour and salt (or use Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour if specified).
4. Add chopped almonds to the flour mixture.
5. In a mixing bowl, blend butter and brown sugar until smooth. Beat in eggs; beat well.
6. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Mix well after each addition.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch pan or three No. 2 cans.
8. Bake for 60-70 minutes in a moderate oven (350°F/175°C). Check for doneness by inserting a toothpick; it should come out clean when the bread is done.
9. Allow the bread to cool before slicing.
